---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that isn't working in Morphix or on the website
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

<!-- Thanks for helping improve Morphix! Please fill in as much as you can. -->

## Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Play '...'
4. See the problem

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Screenshots / audio

If applicable, add screenshots or a short audio/video clip to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **OS & version:** <!-- e.g. macOS 15.4, iPadOS 18.2, Windows 11 24H2, Ubuntu 24.04 -->
- **Morphix version:** <!-- e.g. 1.0.0 -->
- **Plugin format:** <!-- AUv3 / VST3 / Standalone -->
- **Host / DAW:** <!-- e.g. Logic Pro 11, Ableton Live 12, GarageBand, AUM, standalone -->
- **Architecture:** <!-- e.g. Apple Silicon (arm64), Intel (x86_64), ARM64 -->

## Additional context

Anything else that might help — preset in use, recent changes, how often it happens, etc.

<!-- Before filing: please search existing issues to avoid duplicates:
     https://github.com/aleph-void/morphix.alephvoid.com/issues -->
